channel.title: GitHub SCSS Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: cobiwave/simplefolio
item.description: ⚡️ A minimal portfolio template for Developers

item.title: just-the-docs/just-the-docs
item.description: A modern, high customizable, responsive Jekyll theme for documentation with built-in search.

item.title: pages-themes/architect
item.description: Architect is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: Hacker0x01/hacker101
item.description: Source code for Hacker101.com - a free online web and mobile security class.

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: piharpi/jekyll-klise
item.description: 🏖️ Klisé is a minimalist Jekyll theme for running a personal site or blog, light & dark mode support. (https://klise.vercel.app)

item.title: pages-themes/hacker
item.description: Hacker is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: pages-themes/minimal
item.description: Minimal is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: keyvanakbary/learning-notes
item.description: Notes on books I read, talks I watch, articles I study, and papers I love

item.title: black7375/Firefox-UI-Fix
item.description: 🦊 I respect proton UI and aim to improve it.

item.title: andrewbanchich/forty-jekyll-theme
item.description: A Jekyll version of the "Forty" theme by HTML5 UP.

item.title: Fausto-Korpsvart/Gruvbox-GTK-Theme
item.description: A GTK theme based on the Gruvbox colour palette.

item.title: zivong/jekyll-theme-hamilton
item.description: A minimal and beautiful Jekyll theme best for writing and note-taking.
